commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `OPENCLAW_IGNORE_BIND_WARNING` and `OPENCLAW_IGNORE_SPLIT_STATE_WARNING` suppressors for doctor security and state-integrity warnings in managed Docker-out-of-Docker setups, with focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main unconditionally emits the relevant exposed-gateway bind and split-state warnings when those conditions are present, and the PR diff changes those branches. I did not run doctor or tests because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: A narrow repair can preserve trusted-proxy critical diagnostics and restore test env isolation; maintainer approval is still needed before merging the new suppressor policy.

target.title: feat(doctor): suppress warnings for docker-out-of-docker architectures
